evidence_rows.reading: The first commercial-space pool is small enough for direct owner inspection and explicit role correction.
The sheet makes state, role, strength, and driver review explicit before any pilot labeling freeze.

interpretation: V1.13F succeeds when the first theme-diffusion pilot draft becomes reviewable by the owner, not when labeling or training starts.
The branch should stop exactly where owner correction adds the most value.
The next legal move is owner correction, not auto-labeling or auto-training.
